query: SELECT authorName, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM author_profiles GROUP BY authorName HAVING cnt > 1; SELECT COUNT(*) as empty_names FROM author_profiles WHERE authorName IS NULL OR authorName = ''; SELECT COUNT(*) as empty_titles FROM book_profiles WHERE bookTitle IS NULL OR bookTitle = '';
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 46FBtXPMNF6LwZ8.root --database ehSrGoKN2NYhXg8UYLtWGw --execute SELECT authorName, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM author_profiles GROUP BY authorName HAVING cnt > 1; SELECT COUNT(*) as empty_names FROM author_profiles WHERE authorName IS NULL OR authorName = ''; SELECT COUNT(*) as empty_titles FROM book_profiles WHERE bookTitle IS NULL OR bookTitle = '';
